name: Festive Meat Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine beef and ham with milk, eggs, onion, bread crumbs, salt, allspice, and pepper.
2. Shape into meat balls about 2 inches in diameter. (If desired, meat balls may be smaller.)
3. Carefully arrange meat balls in slow-cooking pot.
4. Cover and cook on low for 2 1/2 to 3 1/2 hours.
5. Turn control to High. Stir in flour that has been dissolved in 1/4 cup water.
6. Add catsup and dill weed.
7. Cook on high for 15 to 20 minutes or until slightly thickened.
8. Turn heat off; stir in sour cream.
